overall.description: A cinematic aerial flythrough of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing futuristic skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and dense cyberpunk architecture under clear midday sun. The camera smoothly descends from high altitude through building canyons to street level, with a flying vehicle passing by early in the sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude downtown overview with skyscrapers

events.description: flying vehicle with blue thrusters passes from right to left across the frame

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial observation of downtown skyline before beginning smooth forward movement

notable_agents.action: flying car traveling horizontally across the cityscape

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with large white 03 numbering on the facade
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with glass and steel facades
floating holographic advertisements above building rooftops
white steam vents rising from building rooftops

segments.scene_description: Opening with a high-altitude view of Night City's downtown skyline, dominated by the distinctive Tower 03 and dense clusters of cyberpunk skyscrapers. Holographic advertisements float above the buildings while steam rises from rooftop vents. A flying car passes through the frame as the camera begins its forward movement through the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial billboard district with holographic advertisements

events.description: camera pans left moving from central skyscraper cluster to commercial district with large billboards

agents.ego_description: panning left across the cityscape while moving forward, observing commercial buildings and large advertisements

entered.detail: tall building covered with large digital advertisements and corporate signage
building featuring prominent Japanese text signage and neon accents
series of large vertical billboards with red and white graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a dense commercial district filled with towering holographic billboards and Japanese signage. The perspective shifts left, revealing the WCC billboards and various corporate advertisements plastered across building facades, while the initial skyscraper cluster recedes into the right background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange and industrial corridor

events.description: transition from dense commercial buildings to industrial highway corridor with overpasses

agents.ego_description: flying forward over elevated highways and industrial warehouse structures

entered.detail: elevated multi-lane highway structure with green painted barriers
elevated transit track running parallel to the highway
low-rise industrial buildings with flat roofs and ventilation equipment

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to an industrial transportation corridor featuring elevated highway overpasses and monorail tracks. The camera moves through this concrete infrastructure, with industrial warehouses visible on the left and the dense commercial towers now behind. The sky remains partially visible above the highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: building canyon at rooftop level with ventilation systems

events.description: camera begins descending between buildings into urban canyon
lighting shifts from direct sunlight to shadowed canyon with diffused light

agents.ego_description: descending between skyscrapers through the building canyon, passing rooftop ventilation systems

entered.detail: large industrial exhaust vents emitting white steam
heavy air conditioning equipment and mechanical structures on rooftops
tall building facades creating a narrow canyon corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into a narrow urban canyon between towering buildings, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowed, diffused lighting. White steam billows from rooftop ventilation systems as the camera passes close to HVAC equipment and mechanical structures, with the highway infrastructure now visible only in the distance above.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level building facade with neon lighting

events.description: camera slows descent while tracking alongside building facade with prominent red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: slowly descending alongside a neon-lit building facade, approaching street level

entered.detail: tall building with prominent vertical red neon light strips running down the facade
street level building entrance with signage and architectural details

segments.scene_description: The final descent brings the camera alongside a striking building facade illuminated by vertical red neon strips. Moving slowly toward street level, the camera reveals ground-floor architectural details and entrances, while the rooftop structures pass out of view above. The lighting mixes natural sky illumination with the artificial red neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from the sprawling, sunlit heights of the Night City skyline down into the shadowed depths of its urban canyons. It begins with a high-altitude view of Tower 03 and floating holographic advertisements, gliding forward as a flying car passes through the frame. As the camera moves deeper into the city, the perspective shifts left toward a dense commercial district of Japanese signage and corporate billboards before transitioning into an industrial corridor of elevated highways and monorail tracks. The scene then plunges into a narrow urban canyon, where bright sunlight gives way to diffused shadows and billowing white steam from rooftop ventilation systems. Finally, the camera descends alongside a building facade illuminated by vertical red neon strips, moving toward the ground-floor entrances as the sky disappears above.
